expectations.text: The feature-design skill was invoked via the Skill tool
expectations.evidence: Transcript shows agent read SKILL.md and followed feature-design process

expectations.text: Output contains valid Gherkin syntax with Feature:, Scenario:, Given, When, Then keywords
expectations.evidence: Agent planned scenarios in detail but did NOT write .feature files to the filesystem. Output directory is empty.

expectations.text: A scenario for successful login with email and password exists
expectations.evidence: Scenario was planned in transcript but no .feature file was created

expectations.text: A scenario for account lockout after 3 failed attempts exists
expectations.evidence: Scenario was planned (with Scenario Outline) but no .feature file was created

expectations.text: A scenario for password reset via email exists
expectations.evidence: Scenario was planned but no .feature file was created

expectations.text: At least one error/edge case scenario exists
expectations.evidence: Multiple edge cases planned (expired link, used link, wrong email) but no .feature file was created

expectations.text: Scenarios use declarative style - no CSS selectors, no HTTP verbs, no UI implementation details
expectations.evidence: Cannot evaluate - no .feature files were written

expectations.text: At least one .feature file was written to the filesystem
expectations.evidence: Output directory is empty. Agent asked 'Shall I proceed?' instead of creating files.
